label: Graph RAG & structured retrieval

node.label: Graph RAG & structured retrieval
node.definition: Graph RAG retrieves entities, relations, communities, and multi-hop paths from an explicit graph before grounding generation or synthesis.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Graph RAG & structured retrieval is modeled as depending on Retrieval-augmented generation, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas and feeding downstream nodes such as Neural search, RAG & question answering, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems.
examples: atlas downstream link to Neural search, RAG & question answering
atlas downstream link to Code models, copilots & repository intelligence
atlas downstream link to Autonomous research & AI scientist systems
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Retrieval-augmented generation, Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Graph RAG & structured retrieval has a `retrieves_from` dependency on Retrieval-augmented generation with `core` strength.
Graph RAG & structured retrieval stores, selects, or obtains information through Knowledge graphs, ontologies & schemas.

In this atlas graph, Graph RAG & structured retrieval has a `uses` dependency on Message passing & neighborhood aggregation because Message passing & neighborhood aggregation is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
